speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] Thanks Sam! Now for some cracking sports news - Cook Islands athlete Max Teuruaa has absolutely smashed it at the Australian Athletics Championships! <cite index="22-2">He completed the decathlon with 5986 points, the second-highest score in Cook Islands history</cite>, just behind his own national record!

speaker: alice
text: [Australian accent] What a legend! <cite index="22-3,22-4">Competing over two days against a strong international field, he showed real resilience managing travel fatigue and injury challenges while producing solid performances across multiple disciplines</cite>. That's the spirit we love to see!

speaker: charlie
text: [Australian accent] And <cite index="22-7">when asked about pushing through with an elbow injury, Teuruaa said 'I don't quit. I'll still run the 1500 if I must'</cite> - now that's what I call determination! Champions aren't made in the gym, they're made from something deep inside them - will, dream, vision!
